news_items.headline: Reports: Brewers finalizing trade for McCullers
news_items.summary: The Astros have traded right-hander Lance McCullers Jr., their longest-tenured pitcher, and lefty Colton Gordon to the Brewers for minor-league outfielder Jadyn Fielder.

news_items.headline: Cease, 10 AL relievers silence NL in 15-K shutout
news_items.summary: Starting pitcher Dylan Cease combined with 10 relievers in a dominant three-hit, 15-strikeout shutout of the National League in a 4-0 win in Tuesday night's All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: AL 3B Caminero hit by pitch, exits in 3rd inning
news_items.summary: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game, Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker. Though the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse, X-rays came back negative.

news_items.headline: Reports: No. 1 pick Cholowsky gets record bonus
news_items.summary: Roch Cholowsky, the No. 1 pick in the MLB draft, has reportedly agreed to a contract with the White Sox that includes a record-breaking $10.35M signing bonus.

news_items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
news_items.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
news_items.summary: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.
